lines.speaker: Mrs. Ramirez
lines.text: Hey, Zuzu. Before I ride, I give the bike a quick hello.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Ramirez
lines.text: Brakes, tires, chain. Three little checks, and the whole ride feels calmer.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Ramirez
lines.text: Come try it with me. Your bike tells you when something's off.
